steps.t: Porókho would like to speak with you privately. Porókho is in Hêbatokh, the clan Morutágya camp in Ilmabiri, beneath the Sail-haven of Umbar Baharbêl.
After helping the grateful Morutágya clan with their requests, you feel that you have been dismissed. You should return to Belondor in Dâr Laja, the M…
